applePayToken.description: The stringified and base64 encoded `paymentData` you retrieved from the Apple framework.

fundingSource.description: The funding source that should be used when multiple sources are available. For Brazilian combo cards, by default the funding source is credit. To use debit, set this value to **debit**.

recurringDetailReference.description: This is the `recurringDetailReference` returned in the response when you created the token.

storedPaymentMethodId.description: This is the `recurringDetailReference` returned in the response when you created the token.
